lines: Salome folds a damp cloth until the stained edge disappears inside it.
"Joanna is with Rhoda. If you can speak softly, I can answer."

choices.label: Ask what changed in the fevers
Ask whether the donated medicine works

lines: "Three patients began shivering within the same hour. Only two took the new suppressant."
"The charity tap ran cloudy after the last pressure drop. I wrote both facts down."

choices.label: Ask whether the donated medicine works

lines: "The fever salts work. The suppressant has the right seal under the scraped paint."
"The prayer cards promise an open body. We burn those over the wash pot."
